activities_projects.title: Meaning of Marginalisation
steps: Write the meaning of marginalisation in simple words
Write one example from daily life
Share your answer in class

activities_projects.title: Identify Marginalised Groups
activities_projects.objective: Recognise groups that face marginalisation in society
steps: Write the names of two marginalised groups mentioned in the chapter
Write one problem faced by each group
Discuss why support is needed

activities_projects.title: Fundamental Rights List
steps: Write two Fundamental Rights
Explain them in simple words
Write how these rights help marginalised groups

activities_projects.title: Government Support Programs
activities_projects.objective: Learn how government supports marginalised groups
steps: Write one government scheme for disadvantaged groups
Explain how it helps people
Write why such support is important

activities_projects.title: Equality in Daily Life
steps: Write two examples of equality in school or community
Explain why equal treatment is important
Share your ideas in class

activities_projects.title: Short Story on Helping Others
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of supporting marginalised people
steps: Write a short story about helping someone who faces difficulties
Explain the problem they faced
Write how the problem was solved

activities_projects.title: Words from the Chapter
activities_projects.objective: Learn key vocabulary related to marginalisation
steps: Write words like equality, discrimination, rights
Write their meanings
Use one word in a sentence

activities_projects.title: Rights and Protection
steps: Write one law or rule that protects people from discrimination
Explain it in simple words
Give an example

activities_projects.title: Poster on Equality
activities_projects.objective: Promote equality and respect in society
steps: Draw a poster promoting equality
Add a slogan like 'Equal Rights for All'
Explain the message of the poster

activities_projects.title: Class Discussion on Fairness
activities_projects.objective: Encourage thinking about fairness in society
steps: Discuss why fairness is important
Write two points from the discussion
Write a short summary
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops understanding of fairness and justice
